assertionResults.observation: Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Receipt status, chain, contract, sender, nonce, transaction value, and decoded add parameters match the reviewed intent.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Actual composition fee and protocol share are derived from the canonical event and are distinguished from the pre-submit estimate.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Wallet X and Y deltas, returned residual assets, and recipient per-bin balances reconcile with the receipt.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A reverted, mismatched, orphaned, or noncanonical receipt never produces successful position state.

environment.operatingSystem: GitHub-hosted Linux and independently recorded exact-head validation
